sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n112957" key="xalazofu/lac" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χᾰλαζο-φύλαξ</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῠ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ᾰκος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n112957.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hail-guard, one who averts hail</tr_> by magical rites, Sen. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">QN</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.6</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.700f</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
